articles.title: From green to grey, in Goa
articles.description: Goa’s controversial Section 39A of the Town and Country Planning (Amendment) Act, 2024, has triggered protests from residents. This will impact the environment and local communities, resulting in water and electricity shortages and sewage treatment problems. Snehal Mutha examines how it will affect Goa’s ecosystems and its people

topStories.title: New court filing reveals Pentagon told Anthropic the two sides were nearly aligned — a week after Trump declared the relationship kaput
topStories.description: Anthropic submitted two sworn declarations to a California federal court late Friday afternoon, pushing back on the Pentagon's assertion that the AI company poses an "unacceptable risk to national security" and arguing that the government's case relies on technical misunderstandings and claims that were never actually raised during the months of negotiations.

topStories.title: US permits temporary sale of Iranian oil stranded at sea as crude tops $112 a barrel amid Middle East conflict
topStories.description: US Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent said in a post on X that his department was issuing a temporary authorisation permitting the sale of the stranded Iranian oil.

topStories.title: Pentagon to adopt Palantir AI as core US military system, memo says - The Economic Times
topStories.description: Pentagon to adopt Palantir AI as core US military system, memo says  The Economic Times

topStories.title: US Pauses Sanctions On Iranian Oil At Sea Amid Soaring Prices
topStories.description: The authorization allows for the delivery and sale of Iranian crude oil and other petroleum products loaded onto ships before March 20, and will last through April 19, the US said.

topStories.title: SC grants bail to accused in Andhra Pradesh liquor case
topStories.description: The Supreme Court granted bail to Muppidi Avinash Reddy in the Andhra liquor case, citing completed interrogation and co-accused already granted bail.

topStories.title: Iran war live: Trump says no ceasefire as Khamenei issues defiant message
topStories.description: Trump says Strait of Hormuz must be protected from Iranian attacks 'by other nations who use it'.

topStories.title: US lifts sanctions on some Iranian oil as gas prices soar
topStories.description: The treasury secretary says the move will quickly bring about 140m barrels of oil to global markets.

topStories.title: US Sanctions On Global Network Financing Hezbollah
topStories.description: The United States has imposed sanctions on a global financial network linked to Hezbollah, which is designated by Washington as a foreign terrorist organisation.

topStories.title: US-Israel-Iran War LIVE: US allows sale of oil originating from Iran as Tehran threatens attacks beyond Middle East
topStories.description: US-Israel-Iran War LIVE: Supreme Leader Ayatollah Mojtaba Khamenei said the United States and Israel were acting on a false assumption that assassinating Iran’s top leadership would bring down the government.

topStories.title: US judge sides with New York Times against Pentagon journalism policies
topStories.description: In his ruling, Judge Paul Friedman ruled the Trump administration sought to force out 'disfavoured journalists'.

dailyNews.title:
Assembly election LIVE: 116 candidates, including CM, Speaker, LoP file nominations in Assam
 till Friday
dailyNews.description: Assam Congress on Friday (March 20, 2026) released the fourth list of seven candidates, taking the total tally to 94 in the 126-seat Assembly elections.

dailyNews.title: US Man Jailed For Killing Bird That Tried Stealing Daughter's Food
dailyNews.description: Franklin Ziegler, 30, decapitated a seagull near the Surfside Pier at Morey's Piers & Beachfront Waterparks in North Wildwood in July 2024.

dailyNews.title: Pezeshkian says Iran not seeking war with Muslim neighbours
dailyNews.description: Iran’s President Masoud Pezeshkian says his country is not seeking war with its neighbours.

dailyNews.title: Colombia’s President Gustavo Petro under investigation in US for drug ties
dailyNews.description: Faced with reports that two US prosecutors have opened probes, the left-wing leader denies links to drug traffickers.

dailyNews.title: Iranian strikes on bases used by US caused $800m in damage, new analysis shows
dailyNews.description: Much of the damage was caused in initial retaliatory strikes by Iran in the week after the US and Israel launched its operation.

dailyNews.title: Trump Says US Considering Winding Down Military Operations In Iran War
dailyNews.description: President Donald Trump said on Friday the US was getting very close to meeting its objectives as it considers winding down its military efforts in the Iran war.

dailyNews.title: Trump says US is considering 'winding down' its Middle East military operation
dailyNews.description: Trump says US is considering winding down its Middle East military operation

dailyNews.title: US, Germany, Canada disrupt botnets that infected millions of devices
dailyNews.description: USA-CYBERSECURITY:US, Germany, Canada disrupt botnets that infected millions of devices

dailyNews.title: Military movements indicate Trump is considering Iran ground operation
dailyNews.description: The US is moving military assets to the Middle East that are key to providing support for ground troop operations.

dailyNews.title: Ex-minister Gamboa targeted in Costa Rica’s first extradition to the US
dailyNews.description: A former Supreme Court justice, Celso Gamboa was accused by the US of using government connections to traffic cocaine.

dailyNews.title: US says it struck alleged drug trafficking vessel in Pacific, killing two
dailyNews.description: In an initial statement, the US military said three people survived the strike but did not offer additional details.

dailyNews.title: Will Europe be pulled into the Iran war?
dailyNews.description: Europe is under pressure as Trump pushes allies to support the Iran war. How are they responding?

dailyNews.title: I don't want a ceasefire: Trump says US is 'obliterating' Iran as war rages on
dailyNews.description: I dont want a ceasefire Trump says US is obliterating Iran as war rages on

dailyNews.title: How old is Barron Trump? What we know about US President Donald Trump's youngest son?
dailyNews.description: As Barron Trump turns 20, he is increasingly focused on business and education. He maintains a low profile while attending New York University, with much of his early life kept private, highlighting his preference for a quieter path away from media attention.

dailyNews.title: Trump: No Iranian leaders left to talk to, says war going ‘extremely well’
dailyNews.description: US President Donald Trump said that Iranian leaders are “all gone” and that the White House has “nobody left to talk to.

dailyNews.title: Sri Lanka says it denied US request to land two aircraft at Mattala airport
dailyNews.description: President Anura Kumara Dissanayake says request made on February 26, two days before US and Israel launched war on Iran.

dailyNews.title: 'The View' argues whether Iran campaign is historic blunder like Iraq or will keep future Americans safe
dailyNews.description: CNBC's Sara Eisen argued on "The View" that Trump's Iran military operation will keep future Americans safe from a nuclear threat, but co-hosts pushed back.

dailyNews.title: American Conference Commissioner Tim Pernetti thanks Trump for Army-Navy game executive order
dailyNews.description: American Athletic Conference Commissioner Tim Pernetti praised President Donald Trump for signing an executive order to protect the Army-Navy game's exclusive broadcast window.

dailyNews.title: Rep Boebert rejects call for another $200 billion to fund Iran war, while Americans 'can’t afford to live'
dailyNews.description: Rep. Boebert warned the policies being enacted by the Trump administration are not putting Americans first, warning the GOP needs to change course before the midterms.

dailyNews.title: Denmark Was Ready to Blow Up Airfields to Stop a U.S. Invasion of Greenland
dailyNews.description: The Danes brought blood supplies, explosives and live ammunition to Greenland as part of contingency plans in case President Trump acted on his threats to seize the island.

dailyNews.title: Trump Friend Asked ICE to Detain the Mother of His Child
dailyNews.description: Paolo Zampolli, a former modeling agent and a longtime Trump ally, was in a custody battle over his son. An ICE official agreed to help.

dailyNews.title: Trump calls NATO allies "cowards" as more Marines head toward Middle East
dailyNews.description: The Iran war is nearing the three-week mark as about 2,200 more U.S. Marines and three more warships are headed toward the region, two U.S. officials said.

dailyNews.title: Trump is strategizing means to seize Iran's nuclear stockpiles, sources say
dailyNews.description: The Trump administration has been strategizing methods and options to secure or extract Iran's nuclear materials, according to multiple sources, as the military campaign against Tehran enters a more uncertain phase.

dailyNews.title: Colombian President Petro caught up in narcotics trafficking probes, sources say
dailyNews.description: The separate narco-trafficking investigations, based out of New York's Southern and Eastern districts, didn't set out to target Petro, but his name has come up during the course of the probes, one source said.

dailyNews.title: Trump administration temporarily lifts sanctions on Iranian oil at sea
dailyNews.description: The U.S. Treasury has authorized the purchase of Iranian oil that's already at sea, exempting buyers from the tight sanctions that have restricted Iran's oil industry for years, as the Trump administration grapples with high oil prices.

dailyNews.title: Breaking down how U.S. could undermine its own victory against Iran
dailyNews.description: President Trump is vowing to continue hitting Iran "very hard," even as he said the country's military is "finished." Mark Montgomery, senior fellow at the Foundation for Defense of Democracies, has more.

dailyNews.title: SAVE America Act faces uphill battle in Senate
dailyNews.description: President Trump is pressuring Senate Republicans to pass his voter ID bill, dubbed the "SAVE America Act." Oriana Gonzalez, reporter for NOTUS, and Julia Manchester, national political reporter for The Hill, join "The Takeout" with more on the issues facing lawmakers.
